sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Phatna thungetna hun nuam hi, Pasian i biakkhop ciang;
Ama kiangah lengto ding hi, Nuamna la i
Kamciam manpha hong kipiata, I telsiang semsem ding;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ni tawp ni ciang eite khempeuh

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Pasian Topa Khris min hangin, Eite i kikhawmta.
tun baih hang, A thuciam kip hi;

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A gim, atawl i khete in, Khamgam sik baih ding hi;
I it i lawmte hong ngakna, tua
Kum kivei lo tom kal sungin, Huihpi tuihual ven ciang;
la sa ding, van ah i kimuh ciang.
